writing_target: a coherent pocket-size wealth-freedom book that processes the source markdown notes one by one while keeping the whole corpus arc in view
big_picture_rule: Every chapter prompt points to SUMMARY.md, README.md, source_manifest.tsv, book_plan.md, and the existing generated chapters so the current note is written as part of the full book rather than as an isolated summary.
visual_rule: Referenced images are passed to Codex for inspection when available; include them only when they clarify the source idea, and always use pocket-safe width commands.
pocket_rule: The canonical generated TeX is already configured as a 6x9 pocket book with 1.2x typography.
